mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.description, t.priority, t.due_date, t.actual_start_date, t.actual_completion_date, t.estimated_hours, t.actual_hours, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.status_id, t.assignee_id, t.created_by, t.release_id

s.id as status_id, s.name as status_name, s.order_index as status_order_index, s.color as status_color, u1.id as assignee_id, u1.username as assignee_username, u1.name as assignee_name, u1.email as assignee_email, u2.id as creator_id, u2.username as creator_username, u2.name as creator_name, u2.email as creator_email, r.id as release_id, r.title as release_title

s.id as status_id, s.name as status_name, s.order_index as status_order_index, s.color as status_color, u1.id as assignee_id, u1.username as assignee_username, u1.name as assignee_name, u1.email as assignee_email, u2.id as creator_id, u2.username as creator_username, u2.name as creator_name, u2.email as creator_email, r.id as release_id, r.title as release_title, t2.id as tag_id, t2.name as tag_name, t2.color as tag_color, u3.id as assignee_user_id, u3.username as assignee_user_username, u3.name as assignee_user_name
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN statuses s ON t.status_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON t.created_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN releases r ON t.release_id = r.id LEFT JOIN task_tags tt ON t.id = tt.task_id LEFT JOIN tags t2 ON tt.tag_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN task_assignees ta ON t.id = ta.task_id LEFT JOIN users u3 ON ta.user_id = u3.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT ,
FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN statuses s ON t.status_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON t.created_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN releases r ON t.release_id = r.id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT ,
FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN statuses s ON t.status_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON t.created_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN releases r ON t.release_id = r.id WHERE t.status_id = #{statusId} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT ,
FROM tasks t LEFT JOIN statuses s ON t.status_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON t.created_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN releases r ON t.release_id = r.id WHERE t.status_id IN
#{statusId}
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( title, description, status_id, assignee_id, priority, due_date, actual_start_date, actual_completion_date, estimated_hours, actual_hours, created_by, release_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{status.id}, #{assignee.id}, #{priority}, #{dueDate}, #{actualStartDate}, #{actualCompletionDate}, #{estimatedHours}, #{actualHours}, #{creator.id}, #{release.id}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status_id = #{statusId}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, priority = #{priority}, due_date = #{dueDate}, actual_start_date = #{actualStartDate}, actual_completion_date = #{actualCompletionDate}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, actual_hours = #{actualHours}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status_id = #{statusId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM tasks t WHERE (t.assignee_id = #{userId}) AND t.status_id IN
#{statusId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status_id = (SELECT id FROM statuses WHERE name = '已完成') AND DATE(actual_completion_date) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
SELECT id FROM statuses WHERE name != '已完成'
SELECT tt.task_id as tt_task_id, tt.tag_id as tt_tag_id, t.id as tag_id, t.name as tag_name, t.color as tag_color FROM task_tags tt LEFT JOIN tags t ON tt.tag_id = t.id WHERE tt.task_id = #{taskId}
